title: aa apne dil mein meri tamanna liye hue
aa ki hasti be-lab-o-be-gosh hai tere baghair
aankh se tapka jo aansu wo sitara ho gaya
aao phir garmi dayar-e-ishq mein paida karen
ab ai be-dard kya is ke liye irshad hota hai
afsos guzar gai jawani
anjam har ek shai ka ba-juz khak nahin hai
azm-e-fariyaad! unhen ai dil-e-nashad nahin
badan se ruh rukhsat ho rahi hai
badi dilchaspiyon se subh-e-sham-e-zindagi hogi
ba-qadr-e-shauq iqrar-e-wafa kya
ba-qaid-e-waqt ye muzhda suna raha hai koi
chamak jugnu ki barq-e-be-aman malum hoti hai
chhupata hun magar chhupta nahin dard-e-nihan phir bhi
dil ki bisat kya thi nigah-e-jamal mein
dil tere taghaful se khabar-dar na ho jae
gham mujhe hasrat mujhe wahshat mujhe sauda mujhe
had ho koi to sabr tere hijr par karen
hasti ko meri masti-e-paimana bana de
husn ke dil mein jagah pate hi diwana bane
idrak khud-ashna nahin hai
ijazat de ki apni dastan-e-gham bayan kar len
ishq khud mail-e-hijab hai aaj
jab tak gham-e-ulfat ka unsur na mila hoga
jahan-e-rang-o-bu mein mustaqil takhliq-e-masti hai
jaras hai karwan-e-ahl-e-alam mein fughan meri
jis jagah jama tere khak-nashin hote hain
jo insan baryab-e-parda-e-asrar ho jae
jo mere tangna-e-dil mein tujhko jalwa-gar dekha
jo salik hai to apne nafs ka irfan paida kar
jo umr teri talab mein ganwae jate hain
kamal-e-ilm o tahqiq-e-mukammal ka ye hasil hai
khatm is tarah naza-e-haq-o-baatil ho jae
kho kar teri gali mein dil-e-be-khabar ko main
khud uth ke hath mere gareban mein aa gae
mahfil-e-ishq mein jab nam tera lete hain
manzil mili murad mili muddaa mila
meri rifat par jo hairan hai to hairani nahin
mujhe fikr-o-sar-e-wafa hai hanuz
murattab ho ke ek mahshar ghubar-e-dil se niklega
na wo fariyaad ka matlab na mansha-e-fughan samjhe
nahaq shikayat-e-gham-e-duniya kare koi
rasman hi un ko nala-e-dil ki khabar to ho
sham-e-furqat intiha-e-gardish-e-ayyam hai
shukriya hasti ka! lekin tumne ye kya kar diya
subu par jam par shishe pe paimane pe kya guzri
sukun-pazir junun-e-shabab ho na saka
taqdir mein izafa-e-soz-e-wafa hua
wo jab rang-e-pareshani ko khalwat-gir dekhenge
wusaten mahdud hain idrak-e-insan ke liye
ye daur-e-taraqqi hai rifat ka zamana hai
ye kis ne shakh-e-gul la kar qarib-e-ashiyan rakh di
zabt se na-ashna hum sabr se begana hum
zindan-e-kaenat mein mahsur kar diya
